reviews.review_description: I tried opening it up and it said (can't detect user avatar and an error has occurred) so idk if you could help me then sure I'll write a good review

reviews.review_title: Crashes a lot, lots of issues
reviews.review_description: The app crashes a lot, played last night and crashed I’ve 4 times, making us restart the game. The privet room does not have an option to add people. The science lab heater goes too fast. There is no information about what to do when the mole is found. The garbage can in the garage does not have a hole to place the rejected tubes. No AI characters to complete the crew. Lost or issues with this app, deleted, can’t play
I couldn’t play so yeah not enough players so I couldn’t play ):
I love this game so much because it’s a great game that will make you new friends.
I want to play, but it's permanently stuck on the loading screen.

One of the best games I’ve ever played
Needs more people though

I kinda liked it because it was a good game but it kept making me go to science and nothing else even if I was put in the space shooting area. My hand tracking also wasn't working which made it boring because other people could make their own hand gesture and I was stuck with pre-made gestures. I hope this review helps improve the game and gets more people to play it
The game is really good but my character keeps spawning in the wrong place, can’t play the game much

This game looks very interesting and fun to play, however, I could not go into the other rooms . I ￼could only get to the hacking station. Also because it's new, there weren't other players online which is fine, but it would be good to add bots to play with. Also better tutorials, showing how to get into the other rooms to do other tasks...  please fix as I can tell there is much potential.
